Sandbox_BVD_Mode_tooltip: Custom keeps every slider below as you set it. The other presets snap drivetrain, grip and shove values to a curated profile when the world loads.
Sandbox_BVD_DriverHUD_tooltip: Adds a Better Vehicle Dynamics panel docked beside the vehicle mechanics window, showing the active tuning profile and grip settings (the values vanilla does not display).
Sandbox_BVD_SkidMarks_tooltip: Leaves a ground decal when a tire breaks loose under power or hard braking.
Sandbox_BVD_EnginePower_tooltip: Scales how much pulling force every engine makes. Below 1 feels gutless; above 1 makes hills and ramming trivial.
Sandbox_BVD_LowSpeedGrunt_tooltip: Extra pulling force available at very low wheel speed — the force used to push wrecks and shove through crowds. Lower it for a weaker, more cautious low-end.
Sandbox_BVD_GripLevel_tooltip: Overall traction budget. Lower means the car steps out and spins up more readily.
Sandbox_BVD_WetGrip_tooltip: Fraction of normal grip while it is raining.
Sandbox_BVD_SnowGrip_tooltip: Fraction of normal grip on snow-covered ground.
Sandbox_BVD_OffroadGrip_tooltip: Grip factor on dirt, grass and gravel versus sealed road.
Sandbox_BVD_Drag_tooltip: Aerodynamic resistance scaling. Higher caps top speed sooner and bleeds momentum faster.
Sandbox_BVD_RollResistance_tooltip: Resistance from tires on sealed surfaces. Affects coasting and steady-state speed.
Sandbox_BVD_RollResistanceOffroad_toolti: Extra rolling resistance when off sealed road.
Sandbox_BVD_RealismHPWeight_tooltip: Replaces engine force and mass for the covered vanilla vehicles with Better Vehicle Dynamics' own researched reference figures (see BVD_VehicleData.lua; modded vehicles can register their own via the public API).
Sandbox_BVD_TrunkScaling_tooltip: Scales each vehicle's storage by a per-body-type factor instead of overwriting it. Auto-disabled when 'isoContainers' is present.
Sandbox_BVD_TrunkCar_tooltip: Multiplier on this body type's reference storage. 1.0 keeps the reference value.
Sandbox_BVD_TrunkVan_tooltip: Multiplier on this body type's reference storage. 1.0 keeps the reference value.
Sandbox_BVD_TrunkTruck_tooltip: Multiplier on this body type's reference storage. 1.0 keeps the reference value.
Sandbox_BVD_TrunkTrailer_tooltip: Multiplier on this body type's reference storage. 1.0 keeps the reference value.
Sandbox_BVD_ThrottleStart_tooltip: When off, the engine must be started deliberately (start key or the engine icon) rather than by pressing accelerate.
Sandbox_BVD_KeylessTow_tooltip: When off, easy-tow needs keys in the ignition or the parking brake released.
Sandbox_BVD_ShoveFoliage_tooltip: Force the body transfers into bushes and small plants on contact.
Sandbox_BVD_ShoveZombies_tooltip: Force imparted to living zombies struck by the vehicle.
Sandbox_BVD_ShoveCorpses_tooltip: Force imparted to bodies and gibs on the ground.
Sandbox_BVD_Drift_tooltip: Hold the drift key while cornering at speed to break the rear loose for an arcade-style slide. Bind the key in Mod Options.
Sandbox_BVD_DriftGrip_tooltip: Tire grip kept while drifting. Lower is looser and harder to hold.
Sandbox_BVD_DriftMinSpeed_tooltip: Below this speed the drift key is ignored, so parking doesn't slide.
Sandbox_BVD_DriftSteer_tooltip: How much sharper the front wheels respond while a drift is held.
Sandbox_BVD_DriftRotation_tooltip: Strength of the rotation pushed into the car while drifting + steering. Raise if it slides wide, lower if it spins out.
Sandbox_BVD_TireGripModel_tooltip: Different tire types (worn / standard / modern) get distinct grip on road, rain, snow and off-road instead of one flat value.
Sandbox_BVD_LoadAffectsHandling_tooltip: A heavily laden vehicle pulls away sluggishly from low speed, as if the engine is straining against the weight.
Sandbox_BVD_LoadAffectsFuel_tooltip: Carrying a heavy load burns extra fuel while driving.
Sandbox_BVD_LoadMaxPenalty: Max launch penalty when fully laden
Sandbox_BVD_LoadMaxPenalty_tooltip: Strongest possible reduction in launch force for a fully loaded vehicle (0.50 = up to 50% less force off the line). Eases off as speed builds. Requires 'Load affects handling'.
